sourceMovie.title: Turbulence
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit Turbulence for the same reason it broke through in 2025: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a action rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Claudio Fäh keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The thriller and action blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Extortion
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Turbulence clicked for you, Extortion (2017) is a strong next stop: both trade in thriller and action, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Turbulence?
faq.answer: Try Extortion, Beast, Accident Man—each shares DNA with Turbulence while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Turbulence?
faq.answer: Turbulence (2025) is best described as Thriller, Action, Adventure, Drama, Fantasy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Turbulence worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.1/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this thriller lane.
